examples: If you hand-write your responses, please write legibly.
This thesis should be legibly typed or printed on good quality bond paper.
The containers which coming into the facility should have been legibly affixed labels.
Public figures today face an onslaught of correspondence, and signing every letter yourself and legibly is not always possible.
Educators are putting more lights in classrooms, asking textbook publishers to use larger print, and even encouraging teachers to scrawl more legibly on blackboards.
